tagline: Golden Temple Spiritual Glow & Heritage Punjabi Gastronomy

days.dateLabel: Day 1 - Golden Temple Spiritual Awakening & Heritage Dining

activities.title: Sri Harmandir Sahib (Golden Temple) Sunrise Darshan
activities.description: Experience the serene dawn prayers and shimmering golden reflection across the holy Sarovar (Nectar Pool).

activities.title: Legendary Heritage Thali at Kesar Da Dhaba
activities.description: Savor slow-cooked Dal Makhani simmered for 12 hours over tandoor coals with crispy parathas in Old Amritsar.

activities.title: Wagah Border Beating Retreat & Flag Ceremony
activities.description: Witness the patriotic and high-energy sunset parade between Indian BSF guards and Pakistani Rangers.

days.dateLabel: Day 2 - Historic Amritsar & Partition Museum Walk

activities.title: Jallianwala Bagh Memorial & Heritage Street Stroll
activities.description: Walk through the poignant historic garden memorial before exploring the newly restored colonial heritage bazaar.

activities.title: Kulcha Land Authentic Amritsari Kulcha Feast
activities.description: Indulge in crispy, butter-drenched stuffed potato/paneer kulchas served with spicy chole and chilled sweet lassi.

activities.title: The Partition Museum at Town Hall
activities.description: Explore the world's first museum dedicated to preserving the stories, letters, and artifacts of the 1948 Partition.

days.dateLabel: Day 3 - Rural Punjab Village Experience & Phulkari Shopping

activities.title: Sadda Pind Punjabi Living Heritage Village
activities.description: Experience traditional pottery making, charkha weaving, Bhangra folk dance, and authentic village farm life.

activities.title: Hall Bazaar Phulkari Embroidery & Jutti Shopping
activities.description: Shop for intricate hand-embroidered Phulkari dupattas, traditional Punjabi leather juttis, and brass utensils.

activities.title: Makhan Fish & Chicken Corner Dinner
activities.description: Savor world-famous Amritsari fried fish and tandoori chicken delicacies in a vibrant, family-owned institution.
